text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've come to observe a race, and what a race it is!
Running ahead of the pack is a certain pair of
Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Paaalmeeer! C'mon, bestie, let's gooo! We gotta
show this crowd what we're made of!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Bet! Let's do this, bestie!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daitaku Helios and Mejiro Palmer banter as they
fight for first place with grins on their faces. They
soon close in on the final stretch, and...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Haha... I didn't even make it on the scoreboard...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you did great out there! Don't be sad. Sure
we got scooched off the scoreboard, buuut...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
It's a great time for a selfie! Hang on, I'll be right
back with my phone!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Uh, hmm... I'm not really feeling it right now.
Gimme a sec to get my face ready!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa! What's up? Your face is
always on point!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: C'mon, this is the moment! You're the moment!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I know you're still shook from the race results,
and honestly, mood. That was a major L. Like,
XXL.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
But that's exactly why we gotta turn things
around! We gotta smile and fake it till we make it!
Reach for the stars and stuff, amirite? ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
We can't call ourselves the Runaway Besties if we
drop from the front just 'cause our vibes are off!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
'Sides, if we snap a pic now, we can post a
before-and-after later to show what we look like
when we win!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
We can't wait to see your victory selfie! You can
do it, Runaway Besties!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, squad! It's gonna be so fire! Okay, let me
hear you screeeam!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Who's gonna win the next race?!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: The Runaway Besties!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Who's gonna steal the spotlight at the concert?!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: The Runaway Bestiiiies!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Hahaha! Now that's what I call cheering.
Really got my vibes in order.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right! No time to mope! We're going full steam
ahead! Thanks for your support, fam!

text_block_list.name: Palmer's Fan
text_block_list.text:
Man, Helios, you're so awesome! I'm more of a
Palmer fan myself, but you've got me smiling too!

text_block_list.name: Helios's Fan
text_block_list.text:
Right?! Helios's smile is literally so infectious! I
can't even look at her without grinning myself!
She's the best!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, no cap?! Everyone's seriously smiling up a
storm here! All right, get in, guys, we need a selfie
with the squad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home, I come across Daitaku Helios
and Mejiro Palmer, fresh from hyping up the
stands.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Whoa... So my smile makes them happy, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh, you mean what our fans said before?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yep! So I was thinking, but...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: It'd be high-key awesome if we could cheer even more people up with our smiles! Like, what if we turned up the vibes for the whole country, y'know? ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: We could call it... Operation: Get Japan Hyped!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! That sounds like a plan for sure! But, uh,
how's it gonna work?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, good question. I guess I just gotta find a
way to get the whole country in a party mood... or
something.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey! You're a trainer, right? Got some advice
or somethin'?
choice_data_list: How about getting more attention on you?
Just keep doing what you've been doing!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh. Em. Gee! That's so galaxy-brained!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
If we're talking about getting people to take
notice, there's only one way to do it! And that's
to go viral and ride that wave of attention!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Sheesh, now I'm super hyped! What should I do? Hey, Trainer, you can be my producer, okay?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, this whole idea was, like, your brainchild,
so you get the honors. Anyway, let's do this! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sucked in by her whirlwind of enthusiasm, I end
up becoming her producer for Operation: Get
Japan Hyped. I have no idea how this is going to
work out...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Sooo... what are you gonna do?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
No clue. But I've got my partner and my producer
here, so let's go, go, go! It's time to take the
world by storm!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea how I got appointed as her
producer, but first things first—I have to catch up
with Daitaku Helios!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: What?! I shouldn't do anything different? I know you're my producer and all, but this ain't it, chief!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I calm her down by explaining that her smile's so
genuine that just by racing like normal, she'll
make the spectators happy.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ooh... Okay, it def hits different when you say it
that way!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll keep serving up smiles on the track,
then! ☆ Shout-out for the tip, Trainer!
